name: Dr. Aris Thorne
dialogue_style: Precise and academic, with occasional slips into emotional vulnerability when discussing the past
inventory: Antique fountain pen and ink bottles
Map of the region with marked safe zones

quests.name: Recover the Lost Archives
quests.description: Retrieve historical documents from the ruined university library before scavengers destroy them
quests.reward: Rare pre-war knowledge and access to restricted Archive materials

quests.name: The Last Broadcast
quests.description: Find and repair a radio transmitter to send a message of hope to other survivors
quests.reward: Radio communication equipment and faction reputation

quests.name: Oral Histories
quests.description: Record interviews with elderly survivors about life before the collapse
quests.reward: Unique historical insights and rare trading opportunities

backstory: Dr. Thorne was lecturing on 20th century history when the alarms sounded. He survived the initial chaos by sheltering in the university's archive vault with a handful of students. Now he leads the Archivists of Tomorrow, believing that preserving knowledge and human history is the key to rebuilding civilization. He carries the guilt of being unable to save more of his students, and secretly hopes to find his missing wife, who was across town when the collapse began.
